sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110795" key="filagreuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλαγρ-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lover of the chase,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:107:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
